intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把机场运输链、贵重包裹和最后的侦探反转读顺。

sentences.text: The plane was late and detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.
sentences.focus_zh: detectives、airport 和 all morning 要读出“等了很久”的感觉。

sentences.text: They were expecting a valuable parcel of diamonds from South Africa.
sentences.focus_zh: expecting、valuable parcel、diamonds、South Africa 是这一句的运输链关键词。

sentences.text: A few hours earlier, someone had told the police that thieves would try to steal the diamonds.
sentences.focus_zh: A few hours earlier 后稍停，had told 表示提醒发生在机场等待之前。

sentences.text: When the plane arrived, some of the detectives were waiting inside the main building while others were waiting on the airfield.
sentences.focus_zh: while 前后分成两组人，main building 和 airfield 要对比清楚。

sentences.text: Two men took the parcel off the plane and carried it into the Customs House.
sentences.focus_zh: took the parcel off the plane 和 Customs House 是动作路线。

sentences.text: While two detectives were keeping guard at the door, two others opened the parcel.
sentences.focus_zh: keeping guard 和 opened the parcel 要读成同时发生的两件事。

sentences.text: To their surprise, the precious parcel was full of stones and sand!
sentences.focus_zh: To their surprise 是揭晓反转，stones and sand 要读出吃惊感。
